claim_boundary: Recorded-trajectory forecasting and diagnostic evaluation only. Treatment, causal, counterfactual, policy-improvement, clinical-utility, deployment, and autonomous-decision claims are blocked.
inclusion_exclusion_summary: Adult ICU stay, LOS>=24h, computable 90d mortality, E060 suspected infection plus SOFA>=2 anchor.

rewards.definition: final transition receives +1 survival or -1 90d mortality
rewards.name: terminal_only

rewards.definition: terminal plus 0.25 times clipped SOFA/lactate/MAP physiology change
rewards.name: terminal_plus_intermediate
